Container.Name: CrettyardDigital
Container.Overview: Crettyard Digital Client Portal — a self-hosted branded portal for managing projects, invoices, quotes, decisions, and file sharing with clients. Includes a built-in PostgreSQL database, Caddy reverse proxy, and support for Cloudflare R2 file storage.

Config.Name: Web UI Port
Config.Description: Port for the web interface.

Config.Name: PostgreSQL Data
Config.Description: Persistent storage for the built-in PostgreSQL database.

Config.Name: Uploads
Config.Description: Persistent storage for uploaded files (used when STORAGE_PROVIDER is set to local).

Config.Name: BETTER_AUTH_SECRET
Config.Description: Random string (minimum 32 characters) used to sign authentication tokens. Generate with: openssl rand -base64 32

Config.Name: WEB_URL
Config.Description: The public URL where clients access the portal (e.g. https://clients.yourdomain.com). Used for email links.

Config.Name: USE_BUILT_IN_DB
Config.Description: Set to false to use an external PostgreSQL database instead of the built-in one.

Config.Name: DATABASE_URL
Config.Description: External PostgreSQL connection string. Only required when USE_BUILT_IN_DB is false. Example: postgresql://user:password@host:5432/dbname

Config.Name: STORAGE_PROVIDER
Config.Description: File storage backend: local, s3, minio, or r2.

Config.Name: R2_ACCOUNT_ID
Config.Description: Cloudflare R2 account ID. Required when STORAGE_PROVIDER is r2.

Config.Name: R2_ACCESS_KEY
Config.Description: Cloudflare R2 access key. Required when STORAGE_PROVIDER is r2.

Config.Name: R2_SECRET_KEY
Config.Description: Cloudflare R2 secret key. Required when STORAGE_PROVIDER is r2.

Config.Name: R2_BUCKET
Config.Description: Cloudflare R2 bucket name. Required when STORAGE_PROVIDER is r2.

Config.Name: S3_ENDPOINT
Config.Description: S3-compatible endpoint URL. Required when STORAGE_PROVIDER is s3 or minio.

Config.Name: S3_REGION
Config.Description: S3 region.

Config.Name: S3_BUCKET
Config.Description: S3 bucket name. Required when STORAGE_PROVIDER is s3 or minio.

Config.Name: S3_ACCESS_KEY
Config.Description: S3 access key. Required when STORAGE_PROVIDER is s3 or minio.

Config.Name: S3_SECRET_KEY
Config.Description: S3 secret key. Required when STORAGE_PROVIDER is s3 or minio.

Config.Name: NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL
Config.Description: API URL for the frontend. Leave empty when API and web are served on the same domain (default).

Config.Name: NEXT_PUBLIC_BILLING_ENABLED
Config.Description: Set to true to enable Stripe billing features.

Config.Name: RESEND_API_KEY
Config.Description: Resend API key for sending transactional emails (invitations, notifications).

Config.Name: EMAIL_FROM
Config.Description: Sender email address for outgoing emails.

Config.Name: MAX_FILE_SIZE_MB
Config.Description: Maximum file upload size in megabytes.

Config.Name: SKIP_DB_PUSH
Config.Description: Skip automatic database schema sync on startup. Set to true if using a pooled database connection.

Config.Name: POSTGRES_USER
Config.Description: Username for the built-in PostgreSQL database.

Config.Name: POSTGRES_PASSWORD
Config.Description: Password for the built-in PostgreSQL database.

Config.Name: POSTGRES_DB
Config.Description: Database name for the built-in PostgreSQL database.
